entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Company or legal organization mentioned in a logistics text document.

entity_types.name: Facility
entity_types.description: Warehouse, distribution center, hub, or other logistics facility extracted from prose.

entity_types.name: SoftwareSystem
entity_types.description: Software platform, forecasting service, WMS, or yard system mentioned in text.

entity_types.name: RobotLine
entity_types.description: Automated sorting or robotic line described in a text document.

entity_types.name: Incident
entity_types.description: Operational incident extracted from document chunks.

entity_types.name: Team
entity_types.description: Operational team, shift, or group named in prose.

relation_types.name: HAS_ROBOT_LINE
relation_types.description: Facility contains or operates a robot line.

relation_types.name: INTEGRATED_WITH
relation_types.description: Robot line or system is integrated with another system.

relation_types.name: SHIPS_TO
relation_types.description: Organization ships goods to a facility.

relation_types.name: AFFECTS
relation_types.description: Incident affects a system, facility, or line.

relation_types.name: RESPONSIBLE_FOR
relation_types.description: Team is responsible for handling an incident.

relation_types.name: FEEDS
relation_types.description: System sends forecasting or planning data to another system.
